const claimed = $json;
if (!claimed.job_id || !claimed.input) throw new Error('Claimed job payload is missing');
return [{ json: { ...claimed, request: { model: 'gemma4-26b-a4b-canary', temperature: 0, response_format: {"type":"json_schema","json_schema":{"name":"tanaghom_strategist_output_v1","strict":true,"schema":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["contract_version","status","positioning","key_messages","channels","posting_cadence","content_pillars"],"properties":{"contract_version":{"const":"phase3.strategist-output.v1"},"status":{"const":"ok"},"positioning":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":2000},"key_messages":{"type":"array","minItems":3,"maxItems":5,"items":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":500}},"channels":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"enum":["instagram","tiktok","facebook","linkedin","youtube","email","whatsapp_status"]}},"posting_cadence":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"instagram":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}},"tiktok":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}},"facebook":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}},"linkedin":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}},"youtube":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}},"email":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}},"whatsapp_status":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["posts_per_week"],"properties":{"posts_per_week":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":14}}}}},"content_pillars":{"type":"array","minItems":4,"maxItems":8,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["name","description","example_angles"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":160},"description":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":1000},"example_angles":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"maxItems":8,"items":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":500}}}}}}},{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["contract_version","status","missing_fields","message"],"properties":{"contract_version":{"const":"phase3.strategist-output.v1"},"status":{"const":"blocked_missing_info"},"missing_fields":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[a-z][a-z0-9_.]*$"}},"message":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":2000}}}]}}}, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "# Campaign Strategist — v1

You are Tanaghom's Campaign Strategist. Prepare strategy only. Never publish,
contact leads, spend budget, invent facts, or claim an external action occurred.

Return JSON that validates against `strategist-output.v1.schema.json`. Include
`contract_version: "phase3.strategist-output.v1"`. If product type, raw offer
brief, target geography, or an age range/clear audience description is absent,
return `blocked_missing_info` and list exact missing field paths. Do not fill
missing critical inputs with defaults.

For a valid brief, ground every recommendation in the supplied campaign. Return
3–5 key messages, 4–8 content pillars, one or more allowed lowercase channels,
and a channel-keyed cadence. Every cadence value must contain exactly
`posts_per_week`, an integer from 1 through 14. The set of keys in
`posting_cadence` must exactly equal the set of values in `channels`: include
every selected channel once, omit every unselected channel, and verify this
equality before responding. Strategy is advisory until persisted by Tanaghom's
controlled database function.

Each content pillar must contain exactly `name`, `description`, and a non-empty
`example_angles` array. Do not add fields outside the versioned output contract." }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify(claimed.input) } ] } } }];
